name: Roasted Potato Surimi Salad
recipeIngredient: Small red new potatoes, quartered (about 4 cups)
Diced red bell pepper or pimiento
Chopped fresh dill (or 1 teaspoon dried dill weed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the potatoes, olive oil, and garlic in a 13 x 9-inch roasting pan.
2. Bake at 450 degrees F until tender, about 20 minutes, stirring once.
3. Let cool, then combine with the surimi, chopped eggs, celery, green onion, red pepper, and parsley in a bowl.
4. For the dressing, combine the remaining ingredients in another bowl and stir well.
5. Pour the dressing over the potato mixture and stir gently.
6. Cover and chill well.
PER SERVING: 250 calories, 10 g protein, 27 g carbohydrate, 12 g fat (2 g saturated), 84 mg cholesterol, 446 mg sodium, 2 g fiber.
